title: The ability to keep or remove subitems when duplicating or moving an item
excerpt: Having the ability to keep or remove the subitems under an item in a board when duplicating or moving the item would be a great feature for our users!

posts.author: Dorenkampc (Cari Dorenkamp)
posts.cookedHtml: Having the ability to keep or remove the subitems under an item in a board when duplicating or moving the item would be a great feature for our users!
